name: MP7 | 星点
descriptionEn: Versatile but expensive, the German-made MP7 SMG is the perfect choice for high-impact close-range combat. It has been spray-painted with a stencil of an isometric labyrinth. Kings are just men... and no man should be worshipped - Valeria Jenner, Revolutionary
descriptionZh: 非常好用，但价格昂贵，德国制造的 MP7 微型冲锋枪非常适合高强度的近距离作战。 这把武器使用等距迷宫的漏字板进行了喷漆。 国王只不过是凡人…… 凡人一律不配接受神一般的崇拜 - 革命者瓦莱里娅.琴纳
